sample_data.SAVEBFQ:
DECLARE @KON NVARCHAR(50) SET @KON=(
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOKFISLERI WHERE FIS_TURU IN (1,'01') and  BELGE_NO IN ((SELECT TOP 1  BELGE_NO  FROM #STOKFISLERI WHERE  FB_REF=@FB_REF)) )

DECLARE @KON1 NVARCHAR(50) SET @KON1=ISNULL(((SELECT TOP 1  BELGE_NO  FROM #STOKFISLERI WHERE  FB_REF=@FB_REF)),'')



IF @KON<>0
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ2='2' , MESAJ2='AYNI BELGE NO ILE KAYIT GIREMEZSINIZ !'
END
ELSE IF @KON1=''
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ2='2' , MESAJ2='IRSALIYE NUMARASI GIRINIZ ! BELGE NO ALANINA ! '
END
ELSE 
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ2='0' , MESAJ2='OK'
END
